title: disemma moluccana
intro: Disemma moluccana, also known as the Moluccan Disemma or Moluccana, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Indonesia and the Philippines. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Disemma moluccana is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its health benefits.
